objective: Run an LLM-driven daily time-slot workflow that searches NetEase Cloud Music and plays a selected song through the user's authenticated ncm-cli.

required_tools.purpose: Generate and revise the time-slot music search plan from slot intent, positive keywords, negative keywords, inferred listener profile, and search failure history through DashScope OpenAI-compatible API.
Check login, search NetEase Cloud Music, control playback, and report player state.
Local audio playback backend used by ncm-cli.

required_evidence.description: doctor output proving login, search command availability, and player state.
Structured JSON plan produced by the LLM for the active time slot, including user_profile, search_strategy, and avoid exclusions.
Failed keywords and exact search errors fed back into the LLM for strategy revision.
Search result containing encrypted and original song IDs.
All playable search results are shuffled; the first song is played and the remaining songs are appended with ncm-cli queue add.
When playback stops before the next scheduled time without a manual stop, the workflow refreshes search terms and builds a new shuffled queue.

gates.condition: ncm-cli exists, login check succeeds, search command exists, and player state can be read.
gates.on_failure: Stop with failed preflight and report exact failing check.

gates.condition: LLM returns valid JSON matching the search plan schema; plan includes user_profile; keyword and alternate_keywords do not contain configured negative keywords and are not direct copies of positive keywords.
gates.on_pass: Continue to NetEase Cloud Music search.

gates.condition: Search returns at least one song with encryptedId and originalId.
gates.on_failure: Feed the failed keyword and search error back into the LLM and retry with a revised strategy unless a non-search blocker occurs.

gates.condition: ncm-cli play exits successfully for the first shuffled song and queue add succeeds for remaining shuffled songs.
gates.on_pass: Emit status played with queue evidence.
